fields.name: Customer No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the customer who owns the items on the invoice.

fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the posted invoice.

fields.name: Bill-to Customer No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the customer that you send or sent the invoice or credit memo to.

fields.name: Bill-to Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the customer on the service invoice.

fields.name: Bill-to Name 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies an additional part of the name of the customer that you send or sent the invoice to.

fields.name: Bill-to Address
fields.tooltip: Specifies the address of the customer to whom you sent the invoice.

fields.name: Bill-to Address 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies an additional line of the address.

fields.name: Bill-to City
fields.tooltip: Specifies the city of the address.

fields.name: Bill-to Contact
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the contact person at the customer's billing address.

fields.name: Your Reference
fields.tooltip: Specifies a customer reference, which will be used when printing service documents.

fields.name: Ship-to Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a code for an alternate shipment address if you want to ship to another address than the one that has been entered automatically. This field is also used in case of drop shipment.

fields.name: Ship-to Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the customer at the address that the items are shipped to.

fields.name: Ship-to Name 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies an additional part of thethe name of the customer at the address that the items are shipped to.

fields.name: Ship-to Address
fields.tooltip: Specifies the address that the items are shipped to.

fields.name: Ship-to Address 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies an additional part of the ship-to address, in case it is a long address.

fields.name: Ship-to City
fields.tooltip: Specifies the city of the address that the items are shipped to.

fields.name: Ship-to Contact
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the contact person at the address that the items are shipped to.

fields.name: Order Date
fields.tooltip:
Contains the date when the service order was created.
The program copies the date from the Order Date field in the Service Header table when you post the invoice.
You cannot change the order date because the entry has already been posted.

fields.name: Posting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the posting date for the document.

fields.name: Posting Description
fields.tooltip:
Contains the type and number of the document from which the current invoice was posted.
The program copies the posting description from the Posting Description field on the service header of the service order/invoice you posted.
The description also appears on customer and G/L entries.
You cannot change the posting description because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Payment Terms Code
fields.tooltip:
Contains the code that the program uses to retrieve payment terms applying to the invoice. The program then uses the payment terms to manage due dates and calculate payment discount percentages.
The program copies the code from the Payment Terms Code field on the header of the service document from which the invoice is posted.
You cannot change the payment terms code because the entry has already been posted.

fields.name: Due Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies when the related invoice must be paid.

fields.name: Payment Discount %
fields.tooltip:
Contains the percentage of payment discount that is granted if the customer pays by the date specified in the Pmt. Discount Date field.
The program copies the discount percentage from the Payment Discount % field on the header of the posted service document.
You cannot change the payment discount percentage because the entry has already been posted.

fields.name: Pmt. Discount Date
fields.tooltip:
Contains the date that the customer must pay the invoice by in order to obtain a payment discount. The program uses the date to calculate payment discounts on payments from the customer.
The program copies the date from the Pmt. Discount Date field on the service header of the service order/invoice you posted.
You cannot change the value in the field because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Shipment Method Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code that represents the shipment method for the invoice.

fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the location, such as warehouse or distribution center, from which the service was shipped.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 1 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 1, which is one of two global dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 2 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 2, which is one of two global dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Customer Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the customer's market type to link business transactions to.

fields.name: Currency Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the currency code for the amounts on the invoice.

fields.name: Currency Factor
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a currency factor if an additional reporting currency was set in the General Ledger Setup window. The currency factor shows the relationship between the additional reporting currency and the local currency. The program will automatically record amounts in both LCY and the additional reporting currency, using the relevant exchange rate and the currency factor.
The value of the currency factor is copied from the Currency Factor field in the Service Header table.
You cannot change the value in this field because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Customer Price Group
fields.tooltip:
Contains the code of the price group that the customer belongs to. The code is used when the program calculates the unit price for items on the invoice lines.
The program copies the customer price group code from the Customer Price Group field in the Service Header table.
You cannot change the customer price group because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Prices Including VAT
fields.tooltip:
Specifies that the unit prices on the invoice lines include VAT.
The program copies the information from the Prices Including VAT field in the Service Header table when you post the invoice.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Invoice Disc. Code
fields.tooltip:
Contains the code used to calculate the invoice discount.
The program copies the code from the Invoice Disc. Code field on the service header of the service order/invoice you posted.
You cannot change the value in the field because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Customer Disc. Group
fields.tooltip:
Contains the discount group code assigned to the bill-to customer. The program uses the code to calculate the service invoice line discount given to the customer.
The code is copied from the Customer Disc. Group field on the service header when you post the invoice.
You cannot change the customer discount group code because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Language Code
fields.tooltip:
Contains a code for the language used on the service invoice lines. The code makes it possible for the items on the invoice lines to be written in the customer's language. The program also uses the language on any printouts for the bill-to customer.
The code is copied from the Language Code field on the service header when you post the invoice.
You cannot change the language code because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Salesperson Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the salesperson associated with the invoice.

fields.name: Order No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the related order.

fields.name: Comment
fields.tooltip:
Indicates whether there are any comments attached to the current service invoice.
To view a comment or create a new one, click Related Information, point to Invoice, and then click Comments. A window then appears that displays existing comments and allow you to create new ones.
You can also enter a comment in Notes FactBox.

fields.name: No. Printed
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many times the document has been printed.

fields.name: Applies-to Doc. Type
fields.tooltip:
Indicates whether the invoice has been applied to an already-posted document. If it has, the field shows the type of document applied to.
The program copies the information from the Applies-to Doc. Type field in the Service Header table when you post the invoice.
You cannot change the applies-to document type because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Applies-to Doc. No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies whether the invoice has been applied to an already-posted document. If so, the field contains the number of the document applied to.
The program copies the document number from the Applies-to Doc. No. field in the Service Header table when you post the invoice.
You cannot change the number because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Bal. Account No.
fields.tooltip:
Contains the number of the general ledger account or the bank account to which the program posted a balancing entry for the invoice.
The program copies the balancing account number from the Bal. Account No. field on the service header of the service order/invoice you posted.
You cannot change the number in the field because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total invoice amount excluding VAT.

fields.name: Amount Including VAT
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total invoice amount including VAT.

fields.name: Shipping No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the number assigned to the shipment when you posted the service header. The program automatically used the next number from the number series specified in the Shipping No. Series field on the service header unless you manually entered a number.
The number is copied from the Shipping No. field in the Service Header table when you post the invoice.

fields.name: Posting No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the number assigned to the invoice when you posted the service header. The program automatically used the next number from the number series in the Posting No. Series field on the service header unless you manually entered a number.
The contents of this field is copied from the Posting No. field on the service header. You cannot change the value since the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Last Shipping No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the last posted service shipment number used.

fields.name: Last Posting No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the last posted invoice or credit memo number used.

fields.name: VAT Registration No.
fields.tooltip:
Contains the VAT registration number of the bill-to customer.
The program copies the number from the VAT Registration No. field on the service header when you post the invoice.
You cannot change the VAT registration number because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Reason Code
fields.tooltip:
Contains a specific code that indicates why the entry was created. Thus the reason code will enable you to trace the entry.
The program copies the code from the Reason Code field on the service header when you post the service invoice.
You cannot change the reason code because the entry has already been posted.

fields.name: Gen. Bus. Posting Group
fields.tooltip:
Contains the general business posting group code assigned to the customer whom you sent the invoice.
The program copies the code from the Gen. Bus. Posting Group field in the Service Header table.
You cannot change the code because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: EU 3-Party Trade
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the transaction is related to trade with a third party within the EU.

fields.name: Transaction Type
fields.tooltip:
Contains the code for the transaction type assigned to the service header that the invoice was posted from. The types of transactions are set up in the Transaction Types window. You use the pre-set types to report your trade with other EU countries/regions (see also INTRASTAT).
The program copies the transaction type from the Transaction Type field in the Service Header table when you post the invoice.
You cannot change the code in the posted service invoice.

fields.name: Transport Method
fields.tooltip:
Contains the code of the transport method used for shipment of the service on the invoice.
The program copies the transport method from the Transport Method field in the Service Header table.
You cannot change the transport method code because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: VAT Country/Region Code
fields.tooltip:
Displays the bill-to customer's VAT country/region code. The information will be used in the VAT- VIES Declaration Tax Auth report in connection with trade with other EU countries/regions and in INTRASTAT reporting.
The program copies the code from the VAT Country/Region Code field on the service header when you post the service invoice.
You cannot manually change the VAT country/region code since the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the customer on the service invoice.

fields.name: Name 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies an additional part of the name of the customer on the service credit memo.

fields.name: Address
fields.tooltip: Specifies the address of the customer on the invoice.

fields.name: Address 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies additional address information.

fields.name: City
fields.tooltip: Specifies the city of the address.

fields.name: Contact Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the contact person at the customer company.

fields.name: Bill-to Post Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the postal code of the customer's billing address.

fields.name: Bill-to County
fields.tooltip: Specifies the county in the customer's address.

fields.name: Bill-to Country/Region Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the country/region in the customer's address.

fields.name: Post Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the postal code.

fields.name: County
fields.tooltip: Specifies the county in the customer's address.

fields.name: Country/Region Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the country/region of the address.

fields.name: Ship-to Post Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the postal code of the address that the items are shipped to.

fields.name: Ship-to County
fields.tooltip: Specifies the county in the customer's address.

fields.name: Ship-to Country/Region Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the country/region code of the address that the items are shipped to.

fields.name: Bal. Account Type
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the type of the account to which balancing entries are posted.
The program copies the information from the Bal. Account Type field in the Service Header table.
You cannot change the balancing account type because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Exit Point
fields.tooltip:
Contains the code of the exit port through which you ship the service out of your country/region.
The program copies the code from the Exit Point field in the Service Header table.
You cannot change the code because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Correction
fields.tooltip:
Specifies whether this service invoice has been posted as a corrective entry.
The program copies the code from the Correction field on the service header of the service order/invoice you posted.
You cannot change the code because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Document Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the related document was created.

fields.name: External Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies a document number that refers to the customer's numbering system.

fields.name: Area
fields.tooltip:
Contains the code for the area where the customer company is located.
The program copies the code from the Area field in the Service Header table when you post the invoice.
You cannot change the area code because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Transaction Specification
fields.tooltip:
Contains the transaction specification code that was used in the invoice. The code is used in INTRASTAT reporting.
The program copies the code from the Transaction Specification field in the Service Header table when you post the service invoice.
You cannot change the value in this field because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Payment Method Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies how the customer must pay for products on the service document, such as with bank transfer, cash, or check.

fields.name: Shipping Agent Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies which shipping agent is used to transport the items on the service document to the customer.

fields.name: Pre-Assigned No. Series
fields.tooltip:
Contains the code for the number series that was used to assign a number to the service document from which the invoice was created.
If the posted invoice was created from an invoice, the program automatically copied the value from the No. Series field on the service header. Otherwise, the field is blank.
You cannot change the pre-assigned number series because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: No. Series
fields.tooltip:
Contains the code for the number series that was used to assign a number to the posted invoice.
The program automatically copies the value in this field from the Posting No. Series field on the service header.
You cannot change the number series because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Shipping No. Series
fields.tooltip:
Contains the code for the number series that will be used to assign a number to the shipment created from the service document.
The program copies the code from the Posted Service Shipment Nos. field of the Service Mgt. Setup table.
Note that the field contains a default value which you can change.

fields.name: Order No. Series
fields.tooltip:
Contains the code for the number series that was used to assign a number to the order from which the invoice was created.
The program automatically copies this field from the No. Series field on the header of the service order.
If the invoice was not created from an order, the field is blank.
You cannot change the number series because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Pre-Assigned No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the service document from which the posted invoice was created.

fields.name: User ID
fields.tooltip:
Contains the ID of the user who posted the service invoice.
You cannot change the user ID because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Source Code
fields.tooltip:
Contains the source code assigned to the service invoice header. The code is used to determine the origin of the entry.
The program retrieves the value from the Source Code Setup table.
You cannot change the source code because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Tax Area Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the tax area where the customer is located.

fields.name: Tax Liable
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the customer is liable for sales tax.

fields.name: VAT Bus. Posting Group
fields.tooltip:
Contains the code for the VAT business posting group of the bill-to customer.
The program copies the code from the VAT Bus. Posting Group field in the Service Header table when you post the invoice.

fields.name: VAT Base Discount %
fields.tooltip:
Indicates the percentage used for discounting the VAT element when a payment discount is posted.
The program checks the value against the maximum possible VAT Tolerance % specified in the General Ledger Setup window.
The value in the field is copied from the VAT Base Discount % field in the Service Header table when you post the invoice.

fields.name: Company Bank Account Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the bank account to use for bank information when the document is printed.

fields.name: VAT Reporting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the VAT date on the invoice.

fields.name: Payment Reference
fields.tooltip: Specifies the payment of the service invoice.

fields.name: Dimension Set ID
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a reference to a combination of dimension values. The actual values are stored in the Dimension Set Entry table.


Additional Information


The dimension set ID is not edited directly by users. The value of the field is calculated with the dimension values that users select in the Edit Dimension Set Entries window.


The value 0 represents an empty dimension set.

fields.name: Document Exchange Status
fields.tooltip: Specifies the status of the document if you are using a document exchange service to send it as an electronic document. The status values are reported by the document exchange service.

fields.name: Contact No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the contact at the customer to whom you shipped the service.

fields.name: Bill-to Contact No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the contact person at the customer's billing address.

fields.name: Responsibility Center
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the responsibility center, such as a distribution hub, that is associated with the involved user, company, customer, or vendor.

fields.name: Shipping Agent Service Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies which shipping agent service is used to transport the items on the service document to the customer.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip:
Contains a description of the invoice, such as Invoice 22890.
The program copies the text from the Description field in the Service Header table when the you post the invoice.

fields.name: Service Order Type
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the type of the service order from which the invoice was posted. Service order types are used to group service orders together.
The program copies the code from the Service Order Type field in the Service Header table.
You cannot change the code in the field because the invoice has already been posted.
This field is empty if the invoice had been created manually and then posted.

fields.name: Link Service to Service Item
fields.tooltip:
Specifies that service lines for resources, items and costs must be linked to a service item line within the service invoice.
The program copies the value in this field from the Link Service to Service Item field on the service header. You cannot remove the check mark from the field because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Priority
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the priority of the posted service invoice. There are three options: Low, Medium, and High.
The program copies the value from the Priority field in the Service Header table when you post the invoice.
You cannot edit the contents in the field since the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Allocated Hours
fields.tooltip:
Contains the number of hours allocated to the items within the service invoice.
The program copies the field value from the Allocated Hours field on the service header when you post the invoice.
You cannot change the value because the entry has already been posted.

fields.name: Phone No.
fields.tooltip:
Contains the phone number of the customer in the current invoice.
The program copies the number from the Phone No. field on the service header when you post the invoice.

fields.name: E-Mail
fields.tooltip:
Contains the email address of the customer on the invoice.
The program copies the number from the E-Mail field in the Service Header table when you post the invoice.

fields.name: Phone No. 2
fields.tooltip:
Specifies an alternative phone number of the customer on the current service invoice.
The phone number is copied from the Phone No. 2 field on the service header of the service order/invoice you posted.

fields.name: Fax No.
fields.tooltip:
Contains the fax number of the customer on the posted service invoice.
The program copies the number from the Fax No. field on the service header when you post the invoice.

fields.name: No. of Unallocated Items
fields.tooltip:
Contains the number of service items on the service order that have not been allocated to resources yet.
The program copies the value from the No. of Unallocated Items field in the Service Header table.

fields.name: Order Time
fields.tooltip:
Contains the time when the service order invoiced was created.
The program copies the value from the Order Time field in the Service Header table.
This field is empty if the invoice had been created manually and then posted.

fields.name: Default Response Time (Hours)
fields.tooltip:
Contains the estimated number of hours between the creation of the service order to the time when the service on the service item line starts.
The program copies the time from the Default Response Time (Hours) field in the Service Header table. You cannot change the value because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Actual Response Time (Hours)
fields.tooltip:
Contains the actual number of hours since the creation of the service order to the time when the service order status was changed from Pending to In Process.
The program copies the time from the Actual Response Time (Hours) field in the Service Header table when the service invoice is posted.

fields.name: Service Time (Hours)
fields.tooltip:
Indicates the total time in hours that the service on the posted service invoice has taken.
The program copies the value from the Service Time (Hours) field in the Service Header table when you post the invoice.

fields.name: Response Date
fields.tooltip:
Contains the approximate date when the work on the posted service order starts, that is, when the service order status changes from Pending to In Process.
The program copies the value in the field from the Response Date field in the Service Header table when posting the service invoice.

fields.name: Response Time
fields.tooltip:
Contains the approximate time when the work on the posted service order starts, that is, when the service order status changes from Pending to In Process.
The program copies the value in this field from the Response Time field in the Service Header table when the service invoice is posted.
This field is empty if the invoice had been created manually and then posted.

fields.name: Starting Date
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the starting date of the service on the invoice, that is, the date when the service order status changes from Pending to In Process.
The program copies the value in this field from the Starting Date field on the service header of the service order/invoice you posted.
This field is empty if the invoice had been created manually and then posted.

fields.name: Starting Time
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the starting time of the service on the invoice, that is, the time when the service order status changes from Pending to In Process.
The program copies the value in this field from the Starting Time field in the header of the posted service order.

fields.name: Finishing Date
fields.tooltip:
Contains the date when the service is finished, that is, the date when the service order status changes to Finished.
The program copies the value in this field from the Finishing Date field in the Service Header table when the service invoice is posted.

fields.name: Finishing Time
fields.tooltip:
Contains the time when the service is finished, that is, the time when the service order status changes to Finished.
The program copies the value in this field from the Finishing Time field in the Service Header table.

fields.name: Contract Serv. Hours Exist
fields.tooltip:
Specifies if the service invoice is linked to a certain service contract. A check mark in the field indicates that there are specific service hours attached to the service contract, which apply to the current service invoice as well.
The program copies the field value from the Contract Serv. Hours Exist field on the service header when you post the invoice.

fields.name: Reallocation Needed
fields.tooltip:
Specifies that you must reallocate resources to at least one service item on the service invoice.
The program copies the value in this field from the Reallocation Needed field on the service header.

fields.name: Notify Customer
fields.tooltip:
Indicates in what way the customer wants to receive notification about the service completed. The options are: No, By Phone 1, By Phone 2, By Fax, By E-Mail.
The program copies the value in this field from the Notify Customer field on the Service Header table when the service invoice is posted.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Max. Labor Unit Price
fields.tooltip:
Contains the maximum unit price set for a resource (for example, a technician) on all service lines linked to the posted service invoice.
The program copies the field value from the Max. Labor Unit Price field on the service header when the service invoice is posted.

fields.name: Warning Status
fields.tooltip:
Contains the current warning status for the response time on the posted service order. There are four options: Blank (no status), First Warning, Second Warning and Third Warning.
The program automatically copies the value from the Warning Status field in the Service Header table when the service invoice is posted.

fields.name: No. of Allocations
fields.tooltip:
Contains the number of resource allocations to service items on the posted service invoice.
The program copies the value from the No. of Allocations field on the Service Header table when the service invoice is posted.

fields.name: Contract No.
fields.tooltip:
Contains the number of the contract that the posted service order is associated with.
The program copies the number from the Contract No. field on the service header when the invoice is posted.
If the field is empty, this means that the service order was created manually, i.e. it is not linked to any contract.

fields.name: Type Filter
fields.tooltip:
Contains a type filter. There are five options: Blank, Resource, Item, Service Cost and Service Contract. If you set the filter, the program will produce service ledger entries with the specified type.
For example, if the field is set to Resource, the Dispatch Board window will display information related to service ledger entries with the Resource type only.

fields.name: Customer Filter
fields.tooltip:
Contains a customer filter. The filter enables the program to limit the information range to the entries related to the specified customer.
If this field contains a customer number, the Dispatch Board window will show service invoices for that particular customer only.

fields.name: Resource Filter
fields.tooltip:
Contains a resource filter.
If this field is set to a certain resource number, fields such as No. of Allocations will only display information on service order allocations with that particular resource. The Dispatch Board window will also show the overview of the documents containing the service item lines to which the specified resource is allocated.

fields.name: Contract Filter
fields.tooltip:
Contains a service contract filter.
If this field contains a service contract number, the Dispatch Board window will display service invoices linked to that particular contract only.

fields.name: Ship-to Fax No.
fields.tooltip:
Contains the fax number of the customer to whom the service on the invoice has been shipped.
The program copies the number from the Ship-to Fax No. field in the Service Header table when you post the invoice.

fields.name: Ship-to E-Mail
fields.tooltip:
Contains the email address of the customer to whom the service has been shipped.
The program copies the address from the Ship-to E-Mail field in the Service Header table when you post the invoice.

fields.name: Resource Group Filter
fields.tooltip:
Contains a resource group filter.
If this field contains a particular resource group number, fields such as the No. of Allocations field will display information on the service allocations with that resource group only. The Dispatch Board window will also show the overview of the documents containing the service item lines to which the specified resource group is allocated.

fields.name: Ship-to Phone
fields.tooltip: Specifies the telephone number of the company's shipping address.

fields.name: Ship-to Phone 2
fields.tooltip:
Contains an alternative phone number of the customer to whom the service has been shipped.
The program copies the number from the Ship-to Phone 2 field in the Service Header table when the you post the service invoice.

fields.name: Service Zone Filter
fields.tooltip:
Contains a service zone filter.
If this field specifies a service zone code, the Dispatch Board window will show service shipments for customers within that particular service zone only.

fields.name: Service Zone Code
fields.tooltip:
Contains the service zone code assigned to the customer on the service order. Service zones are used to divide your company market into geographical areas. Thus the code specified in the field allows you to determine the customer's location.
The program copies the code from the Service Zone Code field on the service header when you post the invoice.

fields.name: Expected Finishing Date
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the date when service on the order is expected to be finished.
The program copies the date from the Expected Finishing Date field on the service header when you post the service invoice.

fields.name: Allow Line Disc.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies that a line discount has been calculated for the price offered.
The program retrieves the value from the Allow Line Disc. field in the Service Header table.
You cannot change the value since the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Quote No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the service quote document if a quote was used to start the service process.
